nodes.context: Groups of razor-wielding youths involved in racketeering on local racecourses in the 1930s and 1940s.
Clerkenwell-based organization of Charles Sabini, dominating Brighton's underworld for twenty years.

edges.evidence_quote: Gangs operating in Brighton included the Sabini gang from London's Clerkenwell area.
edges.context: The Sabini gang was one of the gangs operating in Brighton, implying inclusion or presence among the Brighton razor gangs.
